title: Grit Swooper Catalog Index Wiring Anchors Temporary
forbids: CatalogSourceIndex transitional anchors disappearing before catalog cutover
why: Packet 4 introduces explicit catalog source data before Packet 9 cuts catalog generation over to that data. Behavior tests prove semantic source-set equality; this temporary advisory only catches disappearance of the index, reader, equality-test anchor, and transient studio-current exclusion wiring during the transition.
remediate: Restore the transitional catalog source index anchors, or remove this advisory when swooper-catalog-index-cutover registers the permanent SA-09 topology authority. Keep semantic source-set equality in behavior tests, not this Grit pattern.
message: Swooper catalog source index transitional wiring anchors drifted.
